visualizations.title: Mathematical Definition of an Exponent
visualizations.description: General formula showing that a base raised to power n is repeated multiplication.

steps.explanation: Base a raised to the exponent power n.
Multiply the base a by itself. The total number of factors is n.

visualizations.title: Evaluating Powers of 2
visualizations.description: Watch how the number of circles doubles at each power step (2^1 to 2^4).
